subject: load profiles - san diego gas & electric

emails.subject: Load Profiles - San Diego Gas & Electric
emails.subject_base: Load Profiles - San Diego Gas & Electric
emails.body: Load Profiles San Diego Gas Electric Chris, We require 2000 load profiles for SDG&E. Unlike the other utilities, SDG&E does not have 2000 LPs loaded on their web-site. Do you know of a contact at who may be able to help us? Thanks, Ken

emails.subject: RE: Load Profiles - San Diego Gas & Electric
emails.subject_base: Load Profiles - San Diego Gas & Electric
emails.body: RE: Load Profiles San Diego Gas Electric Is this the Class Average Profile? To: Stokley, Chris

emails.subject: RE: Load Profiles - San Diego Gas & Electric
emails.subject_base: Load Profiles - San Diego Gas & Electric
emails.body: The information we require is 2000 dynamic load profiles for individual rate classes by hour (or 1/2 hour). The attached link is where SDG&E has this type of information but 2000 DLPs are not posted. <URL> To: Lewchuk, Ken
